H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h ((x₁' ~ x₂'
                   ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂'
                     ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩]
                       ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩])
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                         ×h Y)) ⟩]))))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h ((x₁' ~ x₂')
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                         ×h Y)) ⟩]
                  ⇒ (y₁' ~ y₂')
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                           ×h Y)) ⟩]
                    ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩])
                      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                               ]tm,
                             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                             ⟩
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y)) ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                             ×h Y)) ⟩]
                      ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩])
                        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                                 [π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       (Γ ×h X))
                                 ]tm,
                               π₂
                                 (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                               ⟩
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h X)
                                      ×h X)) ]tm,
                             π₂
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                             ⟩
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                    ×h Y)) ]tm,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y)) ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y) ×h Y))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                         ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
                  x₂'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                         ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
                  ⇒ y₁'
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                           ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
                    y₂'
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                           ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
                    ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩])
                      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                               ]tm,
                             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                             ⟩
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h X)) ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y)) ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                             ×h Y)) ⟩]
                      ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩])
                        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                                 [π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       (Γ ×h X))
                                 ]tm,
                               π₂
                                 (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                               ⟩
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h X)
                                      ×h X)) ]tm,
                             π₂
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                             ⟩
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                    ×h Y)) ]tm,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y)) ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y) ×h Y))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                         ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
                  x₂'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                         ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
                  ⇒ y₁'
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                           ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
                    y₂'
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                             ]tm,
                           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                         ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                           ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
                    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                      [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩
                       [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                                [π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      (Γ ×h X))
                                ]tm,
                              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                              ⟩
                              [π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                              ]tm,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                            ⟩
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y)) ]tm,
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y)) ⟩
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                        π₂
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
                      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                        [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩
                         [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!
                                  [π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        (Γ ×h X))
                                  ]tm,
                                π₂
                                  (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                                ⟩
                                [π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h X)) ]tm,
                              π₂
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h X) ×h X))
                              ⟩
                              [π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((Γ ×h X)
                                      ×h X) ×h Y))
                              ]tm,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y)) ⟩
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                    ×h Y) ×h Y))
                            ]tm,
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                         ]tm]))))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁'

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((𝟙 ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]

  (π₁

x₂':= π₂

                         ]tm ⟩]))))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

                            ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                                  π₂
                                    (π₁
                                       (π₁
                                          (π₁
                                             (tm_var
                                                (...)))))
                                  ⟩,
                                π₂
                                  (π₁
                                     (π₁
                                        (tm_var
                                           ((...
                                             ×h Y)
                                            ×h Y))))
                                ⟩,
                              π₂
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((...)
                                         ×h X)
                                        ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                              ⟩,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)
                       ⟩]
                      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                        [⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                                         π₂
                                           (π₁
                                              (π₁
                                                 (π₁
                                                 (...))))
                                         ⟩,
                                       π₂
                                         (π₁
                                            (π₁
                                               (tm_var
                                                 (...
                                                 ×h Y))))
                                       ⟩,
                                     π₂
                                       (π₁
                                          (tm_var
                                             (((...)
                                               ×h Y)
                                              ×h Y)))
                                     ⟩,
                                   π₂
                                     (tm_var
                                        ((((Γ ×h X)
                                           ×h X)
                                          ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y)) ⟩)),
                         π₂
                           ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                                 π₂
                                   (π₁
                                      (π₁
                                         (π₁
                                            (tm_var
                                               ((...)
                                                ×h Y)))))
                                 ⟩,
                               π₂
                                 (π₁
                                    (π₁
                                       (tm_var
                                          (((...
                                             ×h X)
                                            ×h Y)
                                           ×h Y))))
                               ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((((Γ ×h X)
                                        ×h X) ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y))) ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]))))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    ⟨ !!,
                    π₂
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                    ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
                    ⟩ ~
                  π₂
                    ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h X) ×h Y)
                                     ×h Y))))) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y) ×h Y)))) ⟩
                  ⇒ π₂
                      ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                          π₂
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        (((...
                                           ×h X)
                                          ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y)))))
                          ⟩,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((((Γ ×h X)
                                      ×h X) ×h Y)
                                    ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩ ~
                    π₂
                      ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                            π₂
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (π₁
                                       (tm_var
                                          (((...)
                                            ×h Y)
                                           ×h Y)))))
                            ⟩,
                          π₂
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((((Γ ×h X)
                                        ×h X) ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (tm_var
                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y)) ⟩
                    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                      [⟨ π₂
                           ⟨ !!,
                           π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         (((...
                                            ×h X)
                                           ×h Y)
                                          ×h Y)))))
                           ⟩,
                       π₂
                         ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (π₁
                                        (tm_var
                                           ((...
                                             ×h Y)
                                            ×h Y)))))
                             ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((...)
                                         ×h X)
                                        ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                           ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                   ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
                       ⟩]
                      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                        [⟨ π₂
                             ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                               π₂
                                 (π₁
                                    (π₁
                                       (π₁
                                          (tm_var
                                             (((...)
                                               ×h Y)
                                              ×h Y)))))
                               ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        ((((Γ ×h X)
                                           ×h X)
                                          ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y))))
                             ⟩,
                         π₂
                           ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                                 π₂
                                   (π₁
                                      (π₁
                                         (π₁
                                            (tm_var
                                               ((...)
                                                ×h Y)))))
                                 ⟩,
                               π₂
                                 (π₁
                                    (π₁
                                       (tm_var
                                          (((...
                                             ×h X)
                                            ×h Y)
                                           ×h Y))))
                               ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((((Γ ×h X)
                                        ×h X) ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y))) ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]))))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                  ⇒ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                             ×h Y))) ~
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h Y))
                    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                      [⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((Γ ×h X)
                                          ×h X)
                                         ×h Y)
                                        ×h Y))))),
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
                      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                        [⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((Γ ×h X)
                                         ×h X)
                                        ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                  ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                               ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                  ⇒ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                             ×h Y))) ~
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                          ×h Y))
                    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                      [⟨ π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((((Γ ×h X)
                                          ×h X)
                                         ×h Y)
                                        ×h Y))))),
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                 ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
                      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                        [⟨ π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((((Γ ×h X)
                                         ×h X)
                                        ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))))
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

                                  ×h Y) ×h Y))))) ~
                  π₂
                    (π₁

                               ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                  ⇒ π₂

                           (tm_var
                              ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X)
                                ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))))
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁' ~ x₂'
                  ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂'
                    ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩]
                      ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩]))))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁' ~ x₂'
                  ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂'
                    ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩]
                      ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩]))))
r': ⊤
⊢ (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁' ~ x₂'
               ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂'
                 ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩]
                   ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩]))))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

                 ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩]
                   ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩]))))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ (∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁' ~ x₂'
               ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂'
                 ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩]
                   ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩]))))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((x₁' ~ x₂'
               ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂'
                 ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩]
                   ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩])
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩])))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((x₁' ~ x₂')
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (y₁' ~ y₂')
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩])
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                         [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
                  ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩])
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⟩])))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩ ]tm ~
              x₂'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩ ]tm
              ⇒ y₁'
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩ ]tm ~
                y₂'
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩ ]tm
                ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩])
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                         [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
                  ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩])
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm,
                         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⟩])))

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩ ]tm ~
              x₂'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩ ]tm
              ⇒ y₁'
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩ ]tm ~
                y₂'
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩ ]tm
                ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                  [⟨ x₁', y₁' ⟩
                   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                          [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                          ]tm,
                        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm,
                      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ⟩
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   ]tm]
                  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                    [⟨ x₂', y₂' ⟩
                     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₁ ⟩
                            [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                            ]tm,
                          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm,
                        π₂
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ⟩
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)) ]tm,
                      π₂
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ⟩ ]tm])))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
x₁':= π₂
  (π₁
     (π₁
        (π₁
           (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
x₂':= π₂
  (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (((tm_var Γ)
                         [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     ((x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ]tm)
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                    ]tm)
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩ ]tm ~
              x₂'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (((tm_var Γ)
                         [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     ((x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ]tm)
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                    ]tm)
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩ ]tm
              ⇒ y₁'
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (((tm_var Γ)
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm)
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       ((x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ]tm)
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩ ]tm ~
                y₂'
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (((tm_var Γ)
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm)
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       ((x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ]tm)
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var

                           ((((Γ ×h X) ×h X) ×h Y)
                            ×h Y))
                        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (π₁
                                         (tm_var
                                            ((...
                                              ×h Y)
                                             ×h Y)))),
                               ((x₁
                                 [π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       (Γ ×h X))
                                 ]tm)
                                [π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h Y)) ]tm)
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h Y) ×h Y))
                               ]tm ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁

                                        (((...)
                                          ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y))))
                             ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                    ×h Y))) ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ⟩])))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H

py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

                               ×h Y)) ⟩))) ~

                                (π₁

                                           ×h Y)
                                          ×h Y)))),

                                 (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                              ]tm)

                                (tm_var

                             ]tm)
                            [π₁

                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                   ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,

                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((Γ ×h X)

                          ⟩,

                          (π₁

                                 ×h Y))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ⟩))

                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        (((Γ ×h X)
                                          ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y)))),

                             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                             ]tm)
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                            ]tm)

                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,

                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var

                                      ×h Y) ×h Y))))

                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

                  ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var

                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (π₁

                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))

                       (π₁

                             (π₁

                                                (tm_var
                                                 ...))),

                                       ]tm)

                                             ×h Y))

                                  ⟩,
                                π₂

                                       ×h Y) ×h Y))
                                ⟩))),

                                  (π₁

                                    (tm_var
                                       (((...)
                                         ×h Y)
                                        ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                          π₂
                            (π₁

                                   ×h Y))) ⟩,
                        π₂
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ⟩) ⟩]
                  ⇒ (pr1 φ)

                         (π₁
                            (π₁

                                         (π₁
                                            (π₁
                                               (tm_var
                                                 (...
                                                 ×h Y)))),

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X

py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (π₂
                ⟨ π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
                ((x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm)
                [π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                ]tm ⟩ ~
              π₂
                ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)))),

                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm)
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ]tm ⟩,
                π₂
                  (π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                ⟩
              ⇒ π₂
                  ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                    ×h Y)))),
                      ((x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm)

                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                  π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  ⟩ ~
                π₂
                  ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h Y) ×h Y)))),

                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩
                ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                  [⟨ π₂
                       ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((Γ ×h X)
                                      ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
                       ((x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      (((Γ ×h X)
                                        ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
                         ((x₁
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm)

                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm)

                            (tm_var

                               (π₁

                                          ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y)))),

                             ]tm)

                            ]tm)

                                      ×h Y) ×h Y))))

                     π₂

                                 (π₁

                                       (tm_var
                                          (((Γ
                                             ×h X)
                                            ×h Y)
                                           ×h Y)))),

                               ]tm)

                              ]tm)
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var

                                    ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                           π₂

                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      (((Γ ×h X)
                                        ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                           ⟩,
                         π₂

                       ⟩ ⟩])))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (((x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm)
              [π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
              ]tm ~
              π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
              ⇒ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                  [⟨ ((x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ]tm)
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩]
                  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                    [⟨ π₂
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                   ×h Y)))),
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⟩])))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (x₁
              [π₁
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
              ]tm ~
              π₂
                (π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
              ⇒ π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                  [⟨ x₁
                     [π₁
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h Y)))) ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩]
                  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                    [⟨ π₂
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                   ×h Y)))),
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⟩])))
r': ⊤
⊢ (∀h (∀h (x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm ~
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ⇒ π₂
               (π₁
                  (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
             π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
             ⇒ (pr1 φ)
               [⟨ x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ]tm,
                π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ⟩]
               ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                 [⟨ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)))),
                  π₂
                    (tm_var
                       (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r': ⊤
⊢ (∀h (∀h (x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var
                       (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm ~
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ⇒ π₂
               (π₁

             π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
             ⇒ (pr1 φ)
               [⟨ x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var

                               ×h Y)))) ]tm,

                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ⟩]

                 [⟨ π₂

                                ×h Y)))),
                  π₂
                    (tm_var
                       (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩]
