H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm ~
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ⇒ π₂
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
             π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
             ⇒ (pr1 φ)
               [⟨ x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ]tm,
                π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
               ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                 [⟨ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)))),
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩])
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm ~
           π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ⇒ (π₂
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
             π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
               [⟨ x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ]tm,
                π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
              ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
                 [⟨ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)))),
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩])
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm)
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          (π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
          ⇒ (π₂
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
            (π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
            ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
               [⟨ x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ]tm,
                π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
              ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
                 [⟨ π₂
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)))),
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩])
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm)
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          (π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
          ⇒ (π₂
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
            (π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ x₁
                 [π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                 ]tm,
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ⟩
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                    [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))),
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x₂ ⟩
                      [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 ]tm]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm)
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                  ]tm)
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          (π₂
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                  ]tm)
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
          ⇒ (π₂
               (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                    [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                 ⟩,
               (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
            (π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                    [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                 ⟩,
               (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ (x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ]tm)
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                         [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm,
                      (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 ]tm,
               (π₂
                  (π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ (π₂
                      (π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)))))
                   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                           ]tm)
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                          ]tm,
                        (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm ⟩,
                      (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   ]tm,
                 (π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                         [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm,
                      (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 ]tm ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm)
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                  ]tm)
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂
               ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm)
             ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          π₂
            ((π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                π₂
                  ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
          ⇒ π₂
              ((π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂
                    ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm) ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ~
            π₂
              ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂
                    ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm) ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ (x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ]tm)
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                         [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm,
                      (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm) ⟩,
                  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 ]tm,
               π₂
                 ((π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                          [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                         ]tm,
                       (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm) ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm) ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     ((π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y))))
                      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                              [π₁
                                 (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                              ]tm)
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                             ]tm,
                           (x₂
                            [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                            ]tm)
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                           ]tm ⟩,
                         π₂
                           ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                            ]tm) ⟩,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ⟩ ]tm),
                 π₂
                   ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                            [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                            ]tm)
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                           ]tm,
                         (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                         ]tm ⟩,
                       π₂
                         ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                          ]tm) ⟩,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                    ]tm) ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm)
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          π₂
            ((π₁
                (π₁
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
          ⇒ π₂
              ((π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm) ~
            π₂
              ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ (x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ]tm)
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm,
                      (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm,
               π₂
                 ((π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                         ]tm,
                       (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm) ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     ((π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y))))
                      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                             ]tm,
                           (x₂
                            [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                            ]tm)
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                           ]tm ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                         ⟩,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ⟩ ]tm),
                 π₂
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                         ]tm,
                       (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm)
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                   ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm),
               (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                            ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                             ]tm),
                        (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ⟩,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   ]tm)))
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                            ]tm),
                       (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm)) ~
            π₂
              ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                      ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm),
                  (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ (x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ]tm)
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                           ]tm),
                      (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm,
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    ((tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                              ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y)) ]tm),
                          (x₂
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                           ]tm)
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                          ]tm ⟩,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                        ⟩,
                      π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ⟩ ]tm)) ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           ((tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y))
                            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                                     ((tm_var
                                         (Γ ×h Y))
                                      [π₁
                                         (tm_var
                                            ((...)
                                             ×h Y))
                                      ]tm),
                                 (x₂
                                  [π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        (Γ ×h Y))
                                  ]tm)
                                 [π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((Γ ×h Y)
                                        ×h Y)) ]tm
                                 ⟩,
                               π₂
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((Γ ×h Y)
                                        ×h Y))) ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                             ⟩ ]tm))),
                 π₂
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                            ]tm),
                       (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((x₁
           [π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           ]tm)
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
               (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                      (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩))
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                     (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩) ~
            π₂
              ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                  (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ (x₁
                  [π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ]tm)
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                      (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm,
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                        (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ⟩,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         ((Γ ×h Y)
                                          ×h Y))),
                               (x₂
                                [π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      (Γ ×h Y))
                                ]tm)
                               [π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y))) ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)),
                 π₂
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                       (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (x₁
          [(π₁
              (π₁
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                x₂
                [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ~
          π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                      x₂
                      [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩))
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                     x₂
                     [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩) ~
            π₂
              ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                  x₂
                  [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ x₁
                 [(π₁
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                       x₂
                       [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm ]tm,
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                        x₂
                        [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                         ]tm ]tm ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ⟩,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         ((Γ ×h Y)
                                          ×h Y))),
                               x₂
                               [(π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      (Γ ×h Y)))
                                [π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((Γ ×h Y)
                                       ×h Y)) ]tm
                               ]tm ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y))) ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)),
                 π₂
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                       x₂
                       [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (x₁
          [π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                         x₂
                         [π₁
                            ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                             [π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                             ]tm) ]tm ⟩,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                    ]tm))) ]tm ~
          π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                      x₂
                      [π₁
                         ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                          ]tm) ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩))
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                     x₂
                     [π₁
                        ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                         ]tm) ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩) ~
            π₂
              ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                  x₂
                  [π₁
                     ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ x₁
                 [π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          ((tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y))
                           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                                    (π₁
                                       (tm_var
                                          ((...)
                                           ×h Y))),
                                x₂
                                [π₁
                                   ((tm_var
                                       (Γ ×h Y))
                                    [π₁
                                       (tm_var
                                          (...))
                                    ]tm) ]tm ⟩,
                              π₂
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((Γ ×h Y)
                                       ×h Y))) ⟩,
                            π₂
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                            ⟩ ]tm))) ]tm,
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                        x₂
                        [π₁
                           ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                            ]tm) ]tm ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ⟩,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         ((Γ ×h Y)
                                          ×h Y))),
                               x₂
                               [π₁
                                  ((tm_var
                                      (Γ ×h Y))
                                   [π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         ((Γ ×h Y)
                                          ×h Y))
                                   ]tm) ]tm ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y))) ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)),
                 π₂
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                       x₂
                       [π₁
                          ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                           ]tm) ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (x₁
          [π₁
             (π₁
                (π₁
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                       x₂
                       [π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩))
          ]tm ~
          π₂
            (π₁
               (π₁
                  ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                      x₂
                      [π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩))
          ⇒ π₂
              (π₁
                 ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                     x₂
                     [π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩) ~
            π₂
              ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                  x₂
                  [π₁
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ x₁
                 [π₁
                    (π₁
                       (π₁
                          ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        ((Γ ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y))),
                              x₂
                              [π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((Γ ×h Y)
                                        ×h Y)))
                              ]tm ⟩,
                            π₂
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                            ⟩,
                          π₂
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩))
                 ]tm,
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                        x₂
                        [π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                        ]tm ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ⟩,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                                   (π₁
                                      (tm_var
                                         ((Γ ×h Y)
                                          ×h Y))),
                               x₂
                               [π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        ((Γ ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y)))
                               ]tm ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y))) ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)),
                 π₂
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                       x₂
                       [π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm ~
          π₂
            ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
            x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            ]tm ⟩
          ⇒ π₂
              ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩ ~
            π₂
              ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                  x₂
                  [π₁
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ x₁
                 [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂
                 ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                   x₂
                   [π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩ ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     ⟨ π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                     x₂
                     [π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                       x₂
                       [π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm ~
          x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ x₁
                 [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ x₂
                   [π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm ~
          x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm
          ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
            ⇒ (pr1 φ)
              [⟨ x₁
                 [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ x₂
                   [π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
r': ⊤
⊢ (∀h (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm ~
       x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm
       ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ⇒ (pr1 φ)
           [⟨ x₁
              [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
           ⇒ (pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
              ⟩])) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r': ⊤
⊢ (∀h (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm ~
       x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm
       ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ⇒ (pr1 φ)
           [⟨ x₁
              [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
           ⇒ (pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
              ⟩])) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (∀h (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm ~
       x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm
       ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ⇒ (pr1 φ)
           [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
           ⇒ (pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm ~
       x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm
       ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
         ⇒ (pr1 φ)
           [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
           ⇒ (pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm ~
       x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
        [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
           ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
           [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
          [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
            [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      (x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
           ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
        (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
        [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
           ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
        ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
           [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm,
            π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
          [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
            [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      (x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
           ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
        (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
        [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
           ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
             ]tm, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
           ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x₂
               [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      (x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
        [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
        (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
        [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm)
             [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
           (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
           [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                ]tm, y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
              ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm)
               [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ)
                    [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                  y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
             (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
             [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      (x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ π₂
          ((π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
           [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                ]tm, y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
              ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ~
        π₂
          ((tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
           [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                ]tm, y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
              ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm)
             [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
           π₂
             ((π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ)
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm)
               [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ)
                    [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                  y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
             π₂
               ((tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ)
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                   y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      (x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ π₂
          ((π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
           [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
              y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ~
        π₂
          ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm)
             [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
           π₂
             ((π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm)
               [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                  y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

              ]tm)

                ]tm)
               [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                  y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      (x₂ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ π₂
          (π₁
             ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
               y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ~
        π₂
          ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ (x₁ [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              ]tm)
             [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
           π₂
             (π₁
                ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                  y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (x₂
                [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                ]tm)
               [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                  y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x₁
      [(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
          y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm ~
      x₂
      [(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
       [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
          y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm
      ⇒ π₂
          (π₁
             ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
               y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ~
        π₂
          ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x₁
             [(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
              [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm,
           π₂
             (π₁
                ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                  y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x₂
               [(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                   y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm,
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x₁
      [π₁
         (π₁
            ((tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
             [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)) ]tm ~
      x₂
      [π₁
         (π₁
            ((tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
             [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)) ]tm
      ⇒ π₂
          (π₁
             ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
               y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ~
        π₂
          ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x₁
             [π₁
                (π₁
                   ((tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                       y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                     ⟩ ]tm)) ]tm,
           π₂
             (π₁
                ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                  y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x₂
               [π₁
                  (π₁
                     ((tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                         ]tm ⟩,
                       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm))
               ]tm,
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x₁
      [π₁
         (π₁
            ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
              y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ]tm ~
      x₂
      [π₁
         (π₁
            ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
              y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ]tm
      ⇒ π₂
          (π₁
             ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
               y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ~
        π₂
          ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x₁
             [π₁
                (π₁
                   ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                     y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
                     ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩)
             ]tm,
           π₂
             (π₁
                ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                  y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ⟩]

                       ]tm ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                     ⟩) ]tm,
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
      x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
      ⇒ π₂
          ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
          y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩ ~
        π₂
          ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂
             ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
             y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩ ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
      x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
      ⇒ y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
      x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
      ⇒ y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
        ⇒ (pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
r': ⊤
⊢ (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
   x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
   ⇒ y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
     ⇒ (pr1 φ)
       [⟨ x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
        y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
       ⇒ (pr1 φ)
         [⟨ x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X

px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
   x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

  ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]

          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
        [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism

Δ: form Γ

py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

r: ⊤
⊢ (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
  ]tm ~
  (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
  ]tm
  ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

    (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm

          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
        [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

Γ: ty H

py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

  ]tm ~
  (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
  ]tm
  ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

       (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
       [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
           [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
         (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
         ]tm ⟩]
