H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
  ]tm ~
  (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
  ]tm
  ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
    [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
    π₂ ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
      [⟨ (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
         [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
       (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
       [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
           [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
         π₂
           ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
            ]tm) ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
  ]tm ~
  (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
  ]tm
  ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
    [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
      [⟨ (x₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
         [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
       (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
       [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ (x₂ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
           [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
         π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ x₁ [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
  ]tm ~
  x₂ [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
  ]tm
  ⇒ y₁
    [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
    ]tm ~ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
      [⟨ x₁
         [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
          ]tm ]tm,
       y₁
       [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
        ]tm ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x₂
           [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
            [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ]tm,
         π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ x₁ [π₁ ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
  ]tm ~
  x₂ [π₁ ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
  ]tm
  ⇒ y₁
    [π₁ ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
    ]tm ~ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
      [⟨ x₁
         [π₁
            ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
             ]tm) ]tm,
       y₁
       [π₁
          ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
       ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x₂
           [π₁
              ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
               ]tm) ]tm, π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ x₁ [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
  x₂ [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
  ⇒ y₁ [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
    π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
      [⟨ x₁ [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
       y₁ [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x₂ [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
         π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ x₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ~ x₂ [tm_var Γ ]tm
  ⇒ y₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ~ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
      [⟨ x₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm, y₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x₂ [tm_var Γ ]tm, π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ x₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ~ x₂ [tm_var Γ ]tm
  ⇒ y₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ~ y₂
    ⇒ (pr1 φ)
      [⟨ x₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm, y₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂ [tm_var Γ ]tm, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
    ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
    ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
r': Δ
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
    ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r': Δ
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
    ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
    ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

r: Δ
⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
  ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂

r': Δ
⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

r': Δ
⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism

px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: Δ
⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: Δ
⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
r': Δ ⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r': Δ ⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x₁, x₂: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
px: Δ ⊢ x₁ ~ x₂
py: Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂
q: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩]
r: Δ ⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₁, y₁ ⟩] ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x₂, y₂ ⟩]

    exact (impl_elim q r).
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r:= pr122 (pr22 φ): partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law (pr1 φ)
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r:= pr122 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))),
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r:= pr122 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))),
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r:= pr122 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁

               ⟩]

                       (tm_var

                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r:= pr122 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁

y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r:= pr122 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r:= pr122 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')))
r': ⊤ [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
⊢ (∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
               ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩]
                 ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')))) [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r': ⊤ [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
⊢ (∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
               ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩]
                 ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')))) [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

r: ⊤ [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
⊢ (∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
               ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂'))))
  [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ (∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
               ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂'))))
  [!!]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
               ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩])))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩])
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩])
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ (y₁' ~ y₂')
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h (((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩])
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩])
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   [π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm,
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ y₁'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm ~
                  y₂'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm)))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                ⟩ ]tm]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                        ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                      ⟩
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm]
                ⇒ y₁'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm ~
                  y₂'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                       ⟩
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm)))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ x'
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((!! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)) ]tm,
                      ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm,
               y₁'
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((!! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                     ]tm)
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                  [π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ x'
                   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((!!
                            [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                            ]tm)
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                           ]tm)
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                 ×h Y)) ]tm,
                        ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                      (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   ]tm,
                 y₂'
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((!! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm)
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)) ]tm,
                      ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       ]tm)
                      [π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                    [π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
                ⇒ y₁'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((!!
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm)
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm ~
                  y₂'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((!!
                           [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                           ]tm)
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm,
                       ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm)))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

              [⟨ x'
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                      ((π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))

                         [π₁
                            (tm_var

                         ]tm)

                      ]tm ⟩,

                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂

                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,

                        ]tm)
                       [π₁

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

              [⟨ x'

                      π₂
                        (((tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm)

                       ]tm) ⟩,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm,

               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                    π₂
                      (((tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                        ]tm)
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm) ⟩,
                  π₂
                    ((tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                     [π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm) ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ x'
                   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                        π₂
                          (((tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                            [π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                            ]tm)
                           [π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h Y)) ]tm) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        ((tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   ]tm,
                 y₂'
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                      π₂
                        (((tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                          [π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                          ]tm)
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y)) ]tm) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      ((tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm) ⟩,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
                ⇒ y₁'
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                       π₂

                           [π₁

                           ]tm)
                          [π₁

                                 ×h Y)) ]tm) ⟩,
                     π₂

                        [π₁

                               ×h Y)) ]tm) ⟩,
                   π₂

                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩

                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                       π₂

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]

              [⟨ x'

                  ⟩,

                [⟨ x'

                                      ×h Y) ×h Y))

                               ×h Y))) ⟩,

                    ⟩,

                  ⟩ ]tm ⟩]

                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,

                                ×h Y)))))
                   [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                    ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y))) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   ]tm,
                 (π₂
                    (tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩,
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
                ⇒ (π₂
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                   ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm ~
                  (π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                   ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm)))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   ((π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((Γ ×h X)
                                      ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                         ⟩,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y))) ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⟩ ]tm),
               π₂
                 ((π₁
                     (tm_var
                        (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                   ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm) ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     ((π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y))))
                      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                           π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      (((Γ ×h X)
                                        ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                           ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h Y))) ⟩,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ⟩ ]tm),
                 π₂
                   ((tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((Γ ×h X)
                                      ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                         ⟩,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y))) ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⟩ ]tm) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    ((π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                          π₂
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                          ⟩,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                 ×h Y))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ⟩ ]tm) ~
                  π₂
                    ((tm_var
                        (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                          π₂
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                          ⟩,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                 ×h Y))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ⟩ ]tm))))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         ((tm_var
                             (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                               π₂
                                 (π₁
                                    (π₁
                                       (tm_var
                                          ((...)
                                           ×h Y))))
                               ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                             ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                 ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    ((tm_var
                        (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                          π₂
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((...) ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                 ×h Y))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ⟩ ]tm)) ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           ((tm_var
                               (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y))
                            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                                 π₂
                                   (π₁
                                      (π₁
                                         (tm_var
                                            (...
                                             ×h Y))))
                                 ⟩,
                               π₂
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       (((...)
                                         ×h Y)
                                        ×h Y))) ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                   ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm))),
                 π₂
                   ((tm_var (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    (((Γ ×h X)
                                      ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                         ⟩,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                ×h Y))) ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ⟩ ]tm) ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       ((tm_var
                           (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        (((...)
                                          ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y))))
                             ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                    ×h Y))) ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)) ~
                  π₂
                    ((tm_var
                        (((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                          π₂
                            (π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                          ⟩,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                 ×h Y))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ⟩ ]tm))))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (π₁
                                     (tm_var
                                        (((...)
                                          ×h Y)
                                         ×h Y))))
                             ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                    ×h Y))) ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)) ⟩)),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                    ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y))) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                               π₂
                                 (π₁
                                    (π₁
                                       (tm_var
                                          ((...
                                            ×h Y)
                                           ×h Y))))
                               ⟩,
                             π₂
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     (((Γ ×h X)
                                       ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                             ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                 ×h Y)) ⟩)),
                 π₂
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                   ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                           π₂
                             (π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      (((Γ ×h X)
                                        ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                           ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h Y))) ⟩,
                       π₂
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ⟩) ~
                  π₂
                    ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                    ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y))) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   ⟨ !!,
                   π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ⟩,
               π₂
                 ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                   π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                 π₂
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩ ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     ⟨ !!,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                 ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                 π₂
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                   ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var
                             (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (tm_var
                        (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                  ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩ ~
                  π₂
                    ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                        π₂
                          (π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                                    ×h Y)))) ⟩,
                      π₂
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y))) ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var
                              (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)
                               ×h Y)))),
                 π₂
                   (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),
               π₂
                 (π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ)
                [⟨ π₂
                     (π₁

                           (tm_var

                               ×h Y)))),
                 π₂

                 ⟩]
                ⇒ π₂
                    (π₁
                       (tm_var
                          (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
                  π₂
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))))
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
              [⟨ π₂
                   (π₁
                      (π₁
                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),

y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ

p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤

                         (tm_var
                            (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))),

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
              ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')))
r': ⊤
⊢ (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
           ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

           ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

r: ⊤
⊢ (∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
           ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩]
           ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩] ⇒ y₁' ~ y₂')
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩])
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩])
            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ⇒ (y₁' ~ y₂')
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h (((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩])
          [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
          ⇒ ((pr1 φ) [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩])
            [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
               [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ⇒ y₁'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
              y₂'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x', y₁' ⟩
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x', y₂' ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
                  [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
            ⇒ y₁'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
              y₂'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
               π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x'
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
           y₁'
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
              [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x'
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm,
             y₂'
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
            ⇒ y₁'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                      [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
              ]tm ~
              y₂'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                      [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
              ]tm))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x'
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                π₂
                  ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
           y₁'
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂
                ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                 [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm)
              ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm
           ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x'
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                       [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂
                    ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm) ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
             y₂'
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                     [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                π₂
                  ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
            ⇒ y₁'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                      [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂
                   ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm) ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
              y₂'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ ((tm_var Γ)
                      [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂
                   ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm) ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X
y₁':= π₂ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x'
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
           y₁'
           [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x'
               [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      ]tm,
                    (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm,
             y₂'
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
            ⇒ y₁'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
              ]tm ~
              y₂'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ (π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
                     [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                     ]tm,
                   (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
              ]tm))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
x':= π₂ (π₁ (π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) X

y₂':= π₂ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)): tm (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y) Y

          [⟨ x'
             [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                      ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                       [π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ]tm),

                  ⟩,

              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
           y₁'

            π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]

            [⟨ x'

                        ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))

                         ]tm),

                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm,
             y₂'

                      ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))

                  ⟩,

              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
            ⇒ y₁'
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                       ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                        [π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        ]tm),
                   (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)

                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩

                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
