                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
              ]tm))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ π₂
               ((π₁
                   (π₁
                      (tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                     x
                     [π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩ ]tm),
           π₂
             ((π₁ (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
              [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                   x
                   [π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
              ]tm) ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ π₂
                 ((π₁
                     (π₁
                        (tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))))
                  [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                       x
                       [π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                  ]tm),
             π₂
               ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                     x
                     [π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩ ]tm) ⟩]
            ⇒ π₂
                ((π₁
                    (tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                      x
                      [π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm) ~
              π₂
                ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                      x
                      [π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm)))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     ((tm_var
                         (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                      [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y))),
                           x
                           [π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                           ]tm ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                         ⟩,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ⟩ ]tm))),
           π₂
             (π₁
                ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                      x
                      [π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm)) ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       ((tm_var
                           (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                        [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                                 (π₁
                                    (tm_var
                                       ((Γ ×h Y)
                                        ×h Y))),
                             x
                             [π₁
                                (π₁
                                   (tm_var
                                      ((Γ ×h Y)
                                       ×h Y))) ]tm
                             ⟩,
                           π₂
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                           ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                         ⟩ ]tm))),
             π₂
               ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                     x
                     [π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ]tm ⟩,
                   π₂
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 ⟩ ]tm) ⟩]
            ⇒ π₂
                (π₁
                   ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                    [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                         x
                         [π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                         ]tm ⟩,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
                    ]tm)) ~
              π₂
                ((tm_var (((Γ ×h X) ×h Y) ×h Y))
                 [⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                      x
                      [π₁
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                      ]tm ⟩,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm)))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ π₂
               (π₁
                  (π₁
                     ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                             (π₁
                                (tm_var
                                   ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                         x
                         [π₁
                            (π₁
                               (tm_var
                                  ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                         ]tm ⟩,
                       π₂
                         (π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩,
                     π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)),
           π₂
             (π₁
                ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                    x
                    [π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩)
           ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ π₂
                 (π₁
                    (π₁
                       ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                               (π₁
                                  (tm_var
                                     ((Γ ×h Y)
                                      ×h Y))),
                           x
                           [π₁
                              (π₁
                                 (tm_var
                                    ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                           ]tm ⟩,
                         π₂
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                         ⟩,
                       π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
                       ⟩)),
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                   x
                   [π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
             ⟩]
            ⇒ π₂
                (π₁
                   ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                           (π₁
                              (tm_var
                                 ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                       x
                       [π₁
                          (π₁
                             (tm_var
                                ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                       ]tm ⟩,
                     π₂
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                     ⟩,
                   π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩) ~
              π₂
                ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                    x
                    [π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ π₂
               ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
               x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ]tm ⟩,
           π₂
             ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
               x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ]tm ⟩,
             π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩ ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ π₂
                 ⟨ π₁
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                 x
                 [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ]tm ⟩,
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                   x
                   [π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                   ]tm ⟩,
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
             ⟩]
            ⇒ π₂
                ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                  x
                  [π₁
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩ ~
              π₂
                ⟨ ⟨ ⟨ π₁
                        (π₁
                           (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))),
                    x
                    [π₁
                       (π₁
                          (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                    ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
             ]tm, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (∀h ((pr1 φ)
          [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
             ]tm, π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
           ⟩]
          ⇒ (pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
               ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
            ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
r': ⊤
⊢ (∀h ((pr1 φ)
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
       ⇒ (pr1 φ)
         [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~
           π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ

y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r': ⊤
⊢ (∀h ((pr1 φ)
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]
       ⇒ (pr1 φ)
         [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]

  [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩]

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X

p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (((pr1 φ)
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩]

            ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩]
         ⇒ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ~

      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (((pr1 φ)
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
         [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
           ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]

             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (((pr1 φ)
       [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
        π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩])
      [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
         ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
      ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
         [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            ]tm, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
           ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
          [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((pr1 φ)
      [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
       π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ⟩
       [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
          ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
            ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]
        ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
          [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₁ ⟩
             [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((pr1 φ)
      [⟨ (x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))) ]tm)
         [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
       (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
       [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
          y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
        π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ (x [π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
            ]tm)
           [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                ]tm, y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
              ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
         (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
         [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
        ⇒ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
          [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
               ]tm, y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ~
          (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
               ]tm, y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤

         [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
       π₂
         ((π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
          [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
               ]tm, y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,

                ]tm, y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm

           ((tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))
            [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                 ]tm, y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
               ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ⟩]
        ⇒ π₂
            ((π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y)))
             [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                  ]tm,
                y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,

            ((tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))

                  ]tm,
                y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm))

            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,

            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,

        ⇒ π₂

         [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,

            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ⟩]

           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]
        ⇒ π₂

               ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ~

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]

      [⟨ x
         [(π₁ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h Y) ×h Y))))
          [⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
             y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ]tm,
       π₂

            ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
              y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ⟩]

               y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,

         π₂
           ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
             y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]
        ⇒ π₂
            (π₁
               ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                 y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩) ~

              y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((pr1 φ)
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂
         ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
         y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩ ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂
           ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
             y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩]
        ⇒ π₂
            ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
            y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩ ~
          π₂
            ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
              y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩)
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤

      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ⇒ y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))

H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((pr1 φ)
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
      ⇒ (pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
        ⇒ y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)))
r': ⊤
⊢ ((pr1 φ)
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
   ⇒ (pr1 φ)
     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ⇒ y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X

p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r': ⊤
⊢ ((pr1 φ)
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
   ⇒ (pr1 φ)
     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,

     ⇒ y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ((pr1 φ)
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩]
   ⇒ (pr1 φ)
     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]
     ⇒ y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ((pr1 φ)
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
  ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
    ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ~
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ ((pr1 φ)
   [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
    y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩])
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
  ⇒ ((pr1 φ)
     [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
      π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩]) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩]
    ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
      [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
      (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ)
  [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
   y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩
   [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
    [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
     π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm]
    ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
      [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
      (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ)
  [⟨ (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
     [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
   (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
    [⟨ (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
       [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
     (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
     ⟩]
    ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
      [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
      (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ)
  [⟨ (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
     [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
   (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
    [⟨ (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
       [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
     π₂ ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
     ⟩]
    ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
      [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
      π₂ ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ)
  [⟨ (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
     [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
   (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
   [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
    [⟨ (x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
       [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm, π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
     ⟩]
    ⇒ (y₁ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm)
      [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ)
  [⟨ x
     [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
     ]tm,
   y₁
   [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm
   ]tm ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
    [⟨ x
       [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
        ]tm ]tm, π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ⟩]
    ⇒ y₁
      [(π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
       ]tm ]tm ~ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ)
  [⟨ x
     [π₁ ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
     ]tm,
   y₁
   [π₁ ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
   ]tm ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
    [⟨ x
       [π₁
          ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
       ]tm, π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ⟩]
    ⇒ y₁
      [π₁
         ((tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm)
      ]tm ~ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ)
  [⟨ x [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
   y₁ [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
    [⟨ x [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm,
     π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ⟩]
    ⇒ y₁ [π₁ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ]tm ~
      π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x [tm_var Γ ]tm, y₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ)
    [⟨ x [tm_var Γ ]tm, π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩ ⟩]
    ⇒ y₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ~ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, y₂ ⟩
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x [tm_var Γ ]tm, y₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x [tm_var Γ ]tm, y₂ ⟩]
    ⇒ y₁ [tm_var Γ ]tm ~ y₂
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: ⊤
⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
r': Δ
⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r': Δ
⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: Δ
⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: Δ
⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
  ⇒ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
r': Δ ⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r': Δ ⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
y₁, y₂: tm Γ Y
p₁: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₁ ⟩]
p₂: Δ ⊢ φ [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩]
r: Δ ⊢ (pr1 φ) [⟨ x, y₂ ⟩] ⇒ y₁ ~ y₂
Δ ⊢ y₁ ~ y₂

    exact (impl_elim p₂ r).
  Qed.

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

  
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q:= pr222 (pr22 φ): (λ _ : partial_setoid_mor_unique_im_law (pr1 φ),
 partial_setoid_mor_hom_exists_law (pr1 φ))
  (pr122 (pr22 φ))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q:= pr222 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q:= pr222 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q:= pr222 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
               [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q:= pr222 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x' ~ x'
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x' [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             y ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q:= pr222 (pr22 φ): ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x' ~ x'
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x' [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             y ⟩]))
q': ⊤ [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
⊢ (∀h (x' ~ x'
       ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x' [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm, y ⟩]))) [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q': ⊤ [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
⊢ (∀h (x' ~ x'
       ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x' [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm, y ⟩]))) [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q: ⊤ [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
⊢ (∀h (x' ~ x'
       ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x' [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm, y ⟩]))) [!! : tm Γ 𝟙]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

       ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)

       ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)

      [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X

⊢ ∀h ((x' ~ x')
      [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩]
      ⇒ (∃h ((pr1 φ)
             [⟨ x' [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm, y ⟩]))
        [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism

p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x

⊢ ∀h (x'
      [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,

      x'
      [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,

        [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,

       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

      [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x'
      [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      x'
      [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x' [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
             y ⟩
             [⟨ ⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x'
      [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      x'
      [⟨ !! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (x' [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm)
               [⟨ ⟨ (!! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
                    [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                    ]tm,
                  (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm,
             y
             [⟨ ⟨ (!! [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ]tm)
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm,
                (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (x' [π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))
                ]tm)
               [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                  (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                  [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm
                  ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
               ]tm,
             y
             [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x'
               [(π₁ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
                [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                   (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm ⟩,

               ]tm,
             y
             [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x'
               [π₁

                      [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))

                   ]tm) ]tm,
             y
             [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
                [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x'
               [π₁
                  ((tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))
                   [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                      π₂
                        ((tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                         [π₁
                            (tm_var
                               ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                         ]tm) ⟩,
                    π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
                   ]tm) ]tm,
             y
             [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                π₂
                  ((tm_var (Γ ×h X))
                   [π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                   ]tm) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x'
               [π₁
                  ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                    π₂
                      (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                    ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                  ⟩ ]tm,
             y
             [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
x':= π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)): tm (𝟙 ×h X) X
y:= π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)): tm ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y) Y
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      x' [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ x'
               [⟨ !!,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
               ]tm,
             y
             [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩,

      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h ((π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
      [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm ~
      (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
      [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ (π₂ (tm_var (𝟙 ×h X)))
               [⟨ !!,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩
               ]tm,
             (π₂ (tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y)))
             [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))) ⟩,
              π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂
        ((tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
         [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm) ~
      π₂
        ((tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
         [⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ]tm)
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ π₂
                 ((tm_var (𝟙 ×h X))
                  [⟨ !!,
                   π₂
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩ ]tm),
             π₂
               ((tm_var ((𝟙 ×h X) ×h Y))
                [⟨ ⟨ !!,
                   π₂
                     (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                   ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                 ⟩ ]tm) ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ ⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩ ~
      π₂ ⟨ !!, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ⟩
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ π₂
                 ⟨ !!,
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩,
             π₂
               ⟨ ⟨ !!,
                 π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
                 ⟩, π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
             ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ ∀h (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
      ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
            [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
             π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
q': ⊤
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
   ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
         [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q': ⊤
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
   ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
         [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))
   ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
         [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)) ~ π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X)))
  [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
  ⇒ (∃h ((pr1 φ)
         [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
    [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm
  ⇒ (∃h ((pr1 φ)
         [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩]))
    [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩]
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm
  ⇒ ∃h (((pr1 φ)
         [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
          π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩])
        [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
           ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))),
         π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)) ⟩
         [⟨ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
            ]tm, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm ~
  (π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h X))) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ (π₂ (π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))))
           [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                ]tm, x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
            π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm,
         (π₂ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
         [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
            x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
          π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ π₂ ((tm_var (Γ ×h X)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm) ~
  π₂ ((tm_var (Γ ×h X)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm)
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ π₂
             ((π₁ (tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y)))
              [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ)
                   [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                 x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
               π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm),
         π₂
           ((tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
            [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                 ]tm, x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
               ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ π₂ ((tm_var (Γ ×h X)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm) ~
  π₂ ((tm_var (Γ ×h X)) [⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ]tm)
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                ((tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
                 [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ)
                      [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
                    x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                  π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm)),
         π₂
           ((tm_var ((Γ ×h X) ×h Y))
            [⟨ ⟨ (tm_var Γ) [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y))
                 ]tm, x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm
               ⟩, π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ]tm) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩ ~ π₂ ⟨ tm_var Γ, x ⟩
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                  x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩),
         π₂
           ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
             x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
           π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩ ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ x ~ x
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ π₂
             (π₁
                ⟨ ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
                  x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
                π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩),
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ x ~ x
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ π₂
             ⟨ π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)),
             x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm ⟩,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ x ~ x
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: ⊤
⊢ x ~ x
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
q': Δ
⊢ x ~ x
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q': Δ
⊢ x ~ x
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    
H: first_order_hyperdoctrine
X, Y: partial_setoid H
φ: partial_setoid_morphism
Γ: ty H
Δ: form Γ
x: tm Γ X
p: Δ ⊢ x ~ x
q: Δ
⊢ x ~ x
  ⇒ ∃h ((pr1 φ)
        [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
         π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])
Δ
⊢ ∃h (φ
      [⟨ x [π₁ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ]tm,
       π₂ (tm_var (Γ ×h Y)) ⟩])

    exact (impl_elim p q).
  Qed.
End PartialEquivalenceRelationMorphisms.

Arguments partial_setoid_morphism {H} X Y.
